data.name: bombo
data.code: arrange([4, s("bd ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(1.0)], [4, s("bd ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(1.0)], [4, s("bd ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(1.0)], [8, s("bd ~ bd ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(1.05)])._scope()

data.name: dembow
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [4, s("sd").struct("~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.85)], [4, s("sd").struct("~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.85)], [8, s("sd").struct("~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~ ~ ~ ~ x ~ ~ x ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.9)])

data.name: bajo regg
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [4, note("c1 ~ c1 ~ g0 ~ c1 ~").s("sine").lpf(480).shape(0.25)], [4, note("c1 ~ c1 ~ g0 ~ c1 ~").s("sine").lpf(480).shape(0.25)], [8, note("c1 ~ c1 ~ g0 ~ bb0 ~ c1 ~ c1 ~ g0 ~ c1 ~").s("sine").lpf(520).shape(0.3)])._scope()

data.name: melodía
data.code: arrange([4, silence], [4, silence], [4, note("c5 eb5 g5 ~ bb4 ~ g4 ~").s("triangle").decay(0.2).sustain(0).room(0.25).gain(0.45)], [8, note("c5 eb5 g5 ~ bb4 ~ g4 eb4").s("triangle").decay(0.2).sustain(0).room(0.3).gain(0.45)])._pianoroll()
